Heartbreaker.name: Разбиватель сердец
bonuses: 2pcs: +15% Damage to assault rifles & +15% Damage to machine guns
4pcs: Headshot marks the enemy. Hits against the marked one: +1% armor and +1% damage, max. 50

Umbra Initiative.name: Инициатива Умбра
bonuses: 4pcs: In cover: +1% crit. damage and +0.3% rate of fire/stack (up to 50). Outside cover: 0.8% armor/stack

Hunter's Fury.name: Ярость охотника
bonuses: 2pcs: +15% Damage for shotguns & +15% Damage for submachine guns
3pcs: +20% Armor per kill & +50% Health per kill
4pcs: Enemies within 15m +20% damage. Kill disorients at 5m, +5% damage 10s (max 5)

Negotiator's Dilemma.name: Дилемма переговорщика
bonuses: 4pcs: Crits mark (up to 3). Crit on the marked 60% damage to others

Hotshot.name: Горячий выстрел
bonuses: 4pcs: 1st headshot +20%, 2nd +10% armor, 3rd recharges. From the 4th - all together

Ongoing Directive.name: Текущая директива
bonuses: 4pcs: Killing a marked one = explosive magazine (+20% damage, bleeding)

True Patriot.name: Истинный патриот
bonuses: 4pcs: Debuffs 2s - Cr: +8% damage, Bel: +2% healing, Syn: -8% damage. Flag=explosion

Breaking Point.name: Точка разрыва
bonuses: 4pcs: Hits → stacks, reload → +2% control and +2% damage 10s

Virtuoso.name: Виртуоз
bonuses: 4pcs: Killing far away → bonus to nearby and vice versa. 4 stacks = x1.5

Tipping Scales.name: Переломный момент
bonuses: 4pcs: Shooting → stacks up to 50: +0.5% control and +4% crit. damage/stack

Concentrated Company.name: Сосредоточенная компания
bonuses: 4pcs: Death of the marked +3% damage +2% crit/participant (max. 35)

System Corruption.name: Системное повреждение
bonuses: 4pcs: First aid kits → ability: +20% armor, +50% bonus, hiding 5s (cd 20s)

Cavalier.name: Кавалерист
bonuses: 4pcs: Outside cover: -5% damage/sec (max. 50%). Full: immunity + allies

Hard Wired.name: Жёсткая проводка
bonuses: 4pcs: The skill reduces the CD of another by 30s, +10% damage/healing 20s (once every 20s)

Measured Assembly.name: Взвешенная сборка
bonuses: 4pcs: +1 lvl. skill/ally in the zone. 6th → Overload 15s

Core Strength.name: Стержневая сила
bonuses: 4pcs: The attribute gives 40% of the other two. Random kernels

Eagle Bearer.name: Орлиное Знамя
Eagle Bearer.d: Accuracy +30% when shooting. Headshot kills: Tenacity 15s

Chameleon.name: Хамелеон
Chameleon.d: 10 headshots +20% damage. 10 to body +20% crit. 10 on legs +20% recharge

Capacitor.name: Конденсатор
Capacitor.d: +1.5% skill damage/stack (max 40). Each Skill Tier +7.5% weapon damage

Strega.name: Стрега
Strega.d: Killing an enemy in status → disorienting everyone within 10m

Agitator.name: Агитатор
Agitator.d: In the holster -50% threat. 10s → charged. +25% RPM, +30% damage 20s

Oxpecker.name: Волоклюй
Oxpecker.d: With Shield: -10%/sec shield health, repair 25% of damage

Bullet King.name: Король Стрелков
Bullet King.d: Doesn't recharge. 100 hits → ammunition in reserve

Iron Lung.name: Железный Лёгкий
Iron Lung.d: Heat scale (50% of the magazine). Full → sets fire

Sweet Dreams / Lullaby.name: Сладкий Сон / Колыбельная
Sweet Dreams / Lullaby.d: Debuff 10c - no first aid kits and armor restoration

Nemesis.name: Немезида
Nemesis.d: Longer trigger → up to +50% damage. Missing speeds up charge

Mantis.name: Богомол
Mantis.d: Non-aggressive enemies are highlighted. Increased damage. Decoy synergy

Dread Edict.name: Суровый Приговор
Dread Edict.d: Headshot kill → set fire to marked ones (10), -50% speed

Sacrum Imperium.name: Sacrum Imperium
Sacrum Imperium.d: Tags for up to 10 targets. Headshot murder → setting everyone on fire

Diamondback.name: Гремучник
Diamondback.d: Random tag. Shot at a marked one = guaranteed crit

The Ravenous.name: Обжора
The Ravenous.d: Alternation of trunks. Charge → AoE burst

Doctor Home.name: Домашний Доктор
Doctor Home.d: Killing a marked one → first aid kit, +10% armor

Vindicator.name: Мститель
Vindicator.d: Illumination of a body part. Hit +40% damage

Kendra's Liberty.name: Свобода
Kendra's Liberty.d: Weak points → Blind Justice. +2%/hit (30). Headshot → shield repair 3%/stack

Tempest.name: Буря
Tempest.d: Full auto. After destroying the Shield +25% damage 20s

Whiplash.name: Хлыст
Whiplash.d: 5s in holster → loaded. Reloads both weapons. +20% RPM +50% damage

The Catalyst.name: Катализатор
The Catalyst.d: Increased skill damage for Skill builds

Tinkerer.name: Умелец
Tinkerer.d: Both weapons are of the same type → additional talent. applies to main

Investor.name: Инвестор
Investor.d: CR +10% crit, Yellow +5% skills, Syn +1% regeneration. 3rd attribute

Memento.name: Мементо
Memento.d: Trophies: +5% damage/+10% armor/+5% skills 10s. Long: +1%/+1%/+0.1% (300s, max 30)

NinjaBike Messenger.name: Курьерский ВелоНиндзя
NinjaBike Messenger.d: Two brand set effects at the same time

Tardigrade Armor System.name: Система Брони «Тихоходка»
Tardigrade Armor System.d: Destroying an ally's armor → repair +80% bonus 10s. KD 45s

Provocator.name: Провокатор
Provocator.d: Threat and Taunt, Damage on Take

BTSU Datagloves.name: Инфоперчатки Чёрных Бивней
BTSU Datagloves.d: Status on enemy → allies +1 Skill Tier 10c

Rugged Gauntlets.name: Особо Прочные Перчатки
Rugged Gauntlets.d: Skill roll → explosion 6m. Enemies +50% skill damage

Imperial Dynasty.name: Императорская Династия
Imperial Dynasty.d: Sets an enemy on fire at 20m. KD 35s

Pyromaniac.name: Пироман
Pyromaniac.d: +40% damage to burning ones. 2 kills → next one lights up

The Railsplitter.name: Дровосек
The Railsplitter.d: Magazine top: +20% RPM −10% damage. Low: +30% damage −15% RPM

Savage Wolverine.name: Дикий Росомаха
Savage Wolverine.d: +40% damage to enemies closer than 7m for 10s after killing

Kingbreaker.name: Цареломатель
Kingbreaker.d: +20% damage to Pulse enemies. 3 kills → Pulse

Test Subject.name: Подопытный
Test Subject.d: Hit with weapon/skill → +5% damage to another for 5s

The Apartment.name: Квартира
The Apartment.d: Top/bottom of the store different bonuses

Sleipnir.name: Слейпнир
Sleipnir.d: +4% damage and RPM per 10 rounds when reloading from empty

Tabula Rasa.name: Чистый Лист
Tabula Rasa.d: +4% handling/hit (max 10). At maximum 10% chance to replenish the store

Ekim's Long Stick.name: Длинная Палка Экима
Ekim's Long Stick.d: +3% damage for every 5m to the target

The Virginian.name: Вирджинец
The Virginian.d: Crit 75% → bullet into the magazine. Next +50% damage

Baker's Dozen.name: Чёртова Дюжина
Baker's Dozen.d: +30% store. Miss from cover 100% → bullet return

Orbit.name: Орбита
Orbit.d: Changing weapons after killing → +40% crit. chance +50% crit. damage 15s

Chainkiller.name: Серийный Убийца
Chainkiller.d: Ultimate Hunter: After a headshot kill, next shot +1250% WD

Strategic Alignment.name: Стратегическое Согласование
Strategic Alignment.d: +20% weapon damage 15s after hit with skill

The Sacrifice.name: Жертва
The Sacrifice.d: +20% damage when both skills are on CD

Contractor's Gloves.name: Перчатки Подрядчика
Contractor's Gloves.d: +40% skill damage 15s after destroying enemy armor

Motherly Love.name: Материнская Любовь
Motherly Love.d: Enemies gain vulnerability +15% damage from other sources 3c

Cap'n.name: Капитан
Cap'n.d: Dash → 20% armor as bonus for you and allies 10s. x3 if closer than 10m to the enemy. CD 10s

Sleight.name: Ловкость
Sleight.d: +40% bonus armor on reload. 0-30% armor to allies when they are reloading

Lockdown.name: Блокировка
Lockdown.d: +25% damage to entangled. 3rd kill → next enemy is restrained

Froth.name: Пена
Froth.d: +25% damage to entangled. 3rd kill → next enemy is restrained

Equalizer.name: Уравнитель
Equalizer.d: Crits +1% total weapon damage 10s, max. 24 stacks

Interchange.name: Обмен
Interchange.d: Change TO this weapon: +13% RPM +12% damage 10s. Change From this: +5% RPM +4.5% damage 10s

Trader.name: Торговец
Trader.d: Change ON: +13% RPM +12% damage. Shift C: +5% RPM +4.5% damage. 10s

Robin.name: Робин
Robin.d: Switch weapons +28% weapon damage 5s. Repeated change during buff - loss by 5s

Bulldog.name: Бульдог
Bulldog.d: While in cover +20% total weapon damage

Vigil.name: Бдительность
Vigil.d: Change weapon type → damage 10s: SMG/shotgun +45% closer than 15m; rifles +40% beyond 25m; ШВ/LMG +15% 15-25m

The Courier.name: Курьер
The Courier.d: Status effect on the enemy → spreads to the nearest one within 10m. CD 10s

Carpenter.name: Плотник
Carpenter.d: +75% grenade radius. Kill grenade → return grenade. +15% armor when aiming a grenade

Combustor.name: Зажигатель
Combustor.d: Thrown skill → explosion every 1.5s at 5m, then every 5s. Skill Tier Damage

Proxy.name: Прокси
Proxy.d: Enemies within 3m of Hive/Turret/Pulse/Bait → Shock. KD 8s

Axel.name: Аксель
Axel.d: First Aid Kit → +1 Skill Tier 15s. At level 6 → Recharge. KD 30s

Henri.name: Анри
Henri.d: +20% weapon damage within 10m of an ally or skill

Lavoisier.name: Лавуазье
Lavoisier.d: Blind/Entangle/Shock on enemy → 50% bonus armor for you and allies at 30m 10s

Best Buds.d: Increase the damage buff from 25% to 50%

Compiler Optimization.d: Decreases Hackstep Protocol cooldown from 20 seconds to 15 seconds.

Endless Hunge.d: Increases the duration of Apex Predator stacks from 10 seconds to 30 seconds.

From the Shadows.d: Increases max stacks for From the Shadows from 50 to 100 and stack gain from 10 to 20.

Max BPM.d: Increases max stacks for Heartstopper from 50 to 100

No Limit.d: Increases Dead Man's Hand damage bonus from 30% to 50%.

Perfect Adrenaline Rush.d:
When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 23% bonus armor for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.
Cooldown: 5s

Perfect Bloodsucker.d: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +12% bonus armor for 10s. Max stack is 10

Perfect Clutch.d: If you are below 20% armor, critical hits repair 3% missing armor. Kills allow you to repair up to 100% armor for 4-10 secondss, based on your [Weapon] core attribute.

Perfect Combined Arms.d: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage by 30% for 3 seconds.

Perfect Creeping Death.d: Causing Status Effect on an enemy has a chance to spread that same Status Effect to the nearest enemy within a 10-meter radius. Can only occur once every 10 seconds.

Perfect Overclock.d: Allies within 15 meters of your deployed skills, gain +30% reload speed and reduce their active cooldowns by 0.6 seconds each second.

Perfect Shock and Awe.d: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 27 seconds.

Perfect Tech Support.d: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 27 seconds.

Perfect Vigilance.d: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage disables this buff for 3 seconds.

Perfectly Calculated.d: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 15%.

Perfectly Opportunistic.d: Enemies you hit with shotguns and marksman rifles amplifies the damage they take by 15% from all sources for 5 seconds.

Perfectly Wicked.d: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 27 seconds.

Positive Reinforcement.d: Increases Feedback Loop skill damage and repair bonus from 10% to 25%.

Press the Advantage.d: Increases max stacks for Striker’s Gamble from 100 to 200. 3 stacks lost per second between 101 and 200 stacks.

Specialized Destruction.d: Increases Aggressive Recon weapon damage bonus from 20% to 40%.

Tactical Superiority.d: Increases Ground Control damage bonus from 15% to 25%.

Target Rich Environment.d: Increases Crowd Control mark count from 3 to 5.

Waving the Flag.d: Increases Red / White / Blue rotation speed to 1.5 seconds.

Ace in the Sleeve.d: Amplifies 1 extra shot when revealing your hand.

Blessed.d: Agents can miss a headshot before resetting the cycle

Cold.d: Increases total bonus armor gained per stack of Heartstopper from 1% to 2%.

Complete Uptime.d: Cancelling your skills will reset their cooldown.

Critical Measures.d: Increases Crowd Control damage to additional marked enemies from 60% to 100%.

Into the Light.d: Increases max stacks for Into the Light from 50 to 100, stack gain from 10 to 20 and stack consumption from 10 to 20

Multithreaded Execution.d: Increases Hackstep Protocol bonus armor from 50% to 100%.

Overwhelming Force.d: Increases the radius of disorient on Apex Predator kills from 5 meters to 10 meters.

Patriotic Boost.d:
Increases Red / White / Blue debuff strength.

Red: 8% to 12%.
White: 2% to 3%.
Blue: 8% to 12%.

Perfect Braced.d: While in cover weapon handling is increased by 50%.

Perfect Focus.d: Increases total weapon damage by 6% every second you are aiming while scoped 8x or higher, up to 60%.

Perfect Glass Cannon.d: All damage you deal is amplified by 30%. All damage you take is amplified by 60%.

Perfect Intimidate.d: While you have bonus armour, gain 1 stack each second up to a max of 8. Each stack increases total weapon damage by 5% to enemies within 10m.

Perfect Overwatch.d: After staying in cover for 8 seconds, increase your and all allies’ total weapon and skill damage by 12% as long as you remain in cover or in a cover-to-cover move.

Perfect Spark.d: Damaging an enemy with a skill increases total weapon damage by 15% for 20 seconds.

Perfect Spotter.d: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 20% to pulsed enemies.

Perfect Trauma.d: Applies blind to enemy hit in the head. Cooldown 20 seconds. Applies bleed to an enemy hit in the chest. Cooldown 20 seconds.

Perfect Vanguard.d: Deploying a shield makes it invulnerable for 5 seconds and grants 50% of your armor as bonus armor to all other allies for 20 seconds. Cooldown is 25 seconds.

Perfectly Efficient.d: Using an armor kit has a 75% chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.

Perfectly Skilled.d:
Skill kills have a 30% chance to reset skill cooldowns.
If no skills were on cooldown, you instead gain one-time buff that immediately refreshes a skill's cooldown when it goes on cooldown.

Perfectly Unbreakable.d: When your armor is depleted, repair 100% of your armor. Cooldown is 55 seconds.

Process Refinery.d: Increases Makeshift Repairs speed from 15 seconds to 10 seconds.

Risk Management.d: Increases total weapon damage gained per stack of Striker's Gamble from 0.65% to 1%.

Short Circuit.d: Decreases Feedback Loop cooldown from 20 seconds to 10 seconds.

Signature Moves.d: Increases signature weapon damage by 20%, and doubles the amount of signature weapon ammo generated by Aggressive Recon.

Strategic Combat Support.d: Increases Ground Control proximity repair from 60% to 120%.

Symptom Aggravator.d: Amplifies all damage you deal to status affected targets by 30%

Trauma Specialist.d: Increases the duration of your bleed status effects by 50% and all bleed damage done by 100%.

Boomerang.d: Critical hits have a 50% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned to the magazine, the next shot has 40% increased damage.

Breadbasket.d: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus 35% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10 seconds. Max stack is 3.

Close & Personal.d: Killing a target within 7 meters grants 30% weapon damage for 10 seconds.

Determined.d: Killing an enemy with a headshot guarantees that the next shot will be a guaranteed headshot.

Eyeless.d: Deal 20% weapon damage to blinded enemies. After 4 kills, applies blind to the next enemy you hit.

Fast Hands.d: Critical hits add a stack of 4% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.

Finisher.d: Swapping from this weapon within 10 seconds of killing an enemy grants 30% critical hit chance and 30% critical hit damage for 15 seconds.

First Blood.d: If scoped, your first shot fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deals headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires a Scope with 8x magnification or higher.

Flatline.d: Amplifies weapon damage by 15% to pulsed enemies. After 2 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.

Frenzy.d: For every 10 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain 3% rate of fire and 3% weapon damage for 5 seconds when reloading from empty.

Future Perfect.d:
Weapon kills grant 1 skill tier for 15 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.
Weapon Kill at tier 6 grant overcharge for 15 seconds. Overcharge cooldown is 90 seconds.

Future Perfection.d:
Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier for 19s. Stacks up to 3 times.
Weapon kills at skill tier 6 grant overcharge for 15 seconds.
Overcharge Cooldown: 90 seconds

Ignited.d: Deal 20% weapon damage to burning enemies. After 4 kills, applies burning to the next enemy you hit.

In Sync.d:
Hitting an enemy grants 15% skill damage for 5 seconds. Using a skill or damaging an enemy with a skill grants 15% weapon damage for 5 seconds.
Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active at the same time.

Killer.d: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants 40% critical hit damage for 10 seconds.

Lucky Shot.d: Magazine capacity is increased by 20%. Missed shots from cover have a 100% chance to return to the magazine.

Measured.d: The top half of the magazine has +20% rate of fire and -30% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -20% rate of fire and +30% total weapon damage.

Naked.d: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants 50% headshot damage for 5 seconds.

Near Sighted.d: Receive 80% stability at the cost of 35% optimal range.

On Empty.d: Reloading from empty grants 30% weapon handling for 10 seconds.

Optimist.d: Weapon damage is increased by 3% for every 10% ammo missing from the magazine.

Outsider.d: After killing an enemy, gain 100% optimal range and 100% accuracy for 10 seconds.

Overflowing.d: Every 3 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.

Overwhelm.d: Suppressing an enemy, that is not currently suppressed, grants 10% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.

Perfect Boomerang.d: Critical hits have a 75% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. If a bullet is returned to the magazine, the next shot has 50% increased damage.

Perfect Breadbasket.d: Landing body shots adds a stack of bonus 50% headshot damage to the next headshot for 10 seconds. Max stack is 2.

Perfect Eyeless.d: Deal 25% weapon damage to blinded enemies. After 3 kills, applies blind to the next enemy you hit.

Perfect Fast Hands.d: Critical hits add a stack of 8% reload speed bonus. Max stack is 40.

Perfect Finisher.d: Swapping from this weapon within 10 seconds of killing an enemy grants 35% critical hit chance and 40% critical hit damage for 15 seconds.

Perfect First Blood.d: If scoped, your first twp shots fired from out of combat or after fully reloading from empty deal headshot damage to any part of the body hit. Requires a Scope with 8x magnification or higher.

Perfect Flatline.d: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to pulsed enemies. After 2 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.

Perfect Frenzy.d: For every 8 bullets in the magazine capacity, gain 3% rate of fire and 3% weapon damage for 5 seconds when reloading from empty.

Perfect On Empty.d: Reloading from empty grants 40% weapon handling for 10 seconds.

Perfect Outsider.d: After killing an enemy, gaint 125% optimal range and 125% accuracy for 10 seconds.

Perfect Overwhelm.d: Suppressing an enemy, that is not currently suppressed, grants 12% weapon damage for 12 seconds. Max stack is 4.

Perfect Perpetuation.d: Headshots grant 50% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown is 16 seconds.

Perfect Preservation.d: Killing an enemy repairs 12% armor over 5 seconds. Headshot kills improves the repair to 24%.

Perfect Pummel.d: 2 consecutive kills refill the magazine and grant 40% weapon damage for 10 seconds.

Perfect Pumped Up.d: Reloading grants 5% weapon damage for 10 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

Perfect Ranger.d: Amplifies weapon damage by 2% for every 4 meters you are away from the target.

Perfect Reformation.d: Headshots grant 40% skill repair for 8 seconds.

Perfect Rifleman.d: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus 11% weapon damage for 5 seconds. Max stack is 6. Additional headshots refresh the duration.

Perfect Sadist.d: Deal +25% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 3 kills, applies bleed to the next enemy you hit.

Perfect Salvage.d: Killing a target has a 85% chance to refill the magazine.

Perfect Sledgehammer.d: Dealing damage with a grenade applies a mark on target. Targets with marks take 40% more damage to armor and -10% movement speed.

Perfect Spike.d: Headshots grant 25% skill damage for 8 seconds.

Perfect Unwavering.d: Swapping to this weapon grants 400% weapon handling for 5 seconds. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5 seconds.

Perfectly Close & Personal.d: Killing a target within 7 meters grants 38% weapon damage for 10 seconds.

Perfectly Determined.d: Killing an enemy with a headshot guarantees that the next shot will be a critical headshot. Exclusive for Pistols, Rifles and Marksmen Rifles.

Perfectly Ignited.d: Deal 25% weapon damage to burning enemies. After 3 kills, applies burning to the next enemy you hit.

Hitting an enemy grants +20% skill damage for 5 seconds.
Using a skill or damaging an enemy with a skill grants +20% weapon damage for 5 seconds.
Damage increases are doubled while both buffs are active at the same time.

Perfectly Measured.d: The top half of the magazine has +20% rate of fire and -27% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -20% rate of fire and +33% weapon damage.

Perfectly Naked.d: Hitting an enemy with no armor grants 50% headshot damage for 8 seconds.

Perfectly Near Sighted.d: Receive 100% stability at the cost of 35% optimal range.

Perfectly Overflowing.d: Every 2 reloads from empty increases your base magazine capacity by 100%.

Perfectly Steady Handed.d: Hits grant a stack of 1% accuracy and stability. At 75 stacks, consumes them to refill the magazine.

Perfectly Strained.d: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5 seconds you are firing. Stacks up to 8 times.

Perfectly Unhinged.d: Receive 22% weapon damage at the cost of 25% stability and 25% accuracy.

Perfectly Vindictive.d: Killing an enemy with a status effect applied grants all group members within 20 meters, 18% critical hit chance and 18% critical hit damage for 20 seconds.

Perpetuation.d: Headshots grant 50% status effect damage and duration to the next status effect you apply. Cooldown is 20 seconds.

Preservation.d: Killing an enemy repairs 10% armor over 5 seconds. Headshot kills improves the repair to 20%.

Primer Rounds.d: Damaged enemies lose 50% burn resistance for 5 seconds.

Pumped Up.d: Reloading grants 1% weapon damage for 10 seconds. Stacks up to 25.

Rifleman.d: Landing headshots adds a stack of bonus 10% weapon damage for 5 seconds. Max stack is 5. Additional headshots refresh the duration.

Sadist.d: Deal 20% weapon damage to bleeding enemies. After 4 kills, applies bleed to next enemy you hit.

Dealing damage with a grenade applies a mark on target.
Targets with marks will take 30% more damage to armor and have a -5% movement speed. Mark will disappears after 10 seconds.

Strained.d: Gain 10% critical hit damage for every 0.5 seconds you are firing. Stacks up to 5 times.

Swift.d: Performing a cover to cover grants 20% weapon damage for 15 seconds.

Talent Perfectly Determined.d: Killing an enemy with a headshot guarantees that the next shot will be a critical headshot. Exclusive for Pistols, Rifles and Marksmen Rifles.

Twinkling Lights.d: Only at night with twinkling lights can you feel their heads with festive might.

Unhinged.d: Receive 18% weapon damage at the cost of 25% stability and 25% accuracy.

Unwavering.d: Swapping to this weapon grants 300% weapon handling for 5 seconds. Kills refresh the buff. Swapping away disables this from all weapons for 5 seconds.

Vindictive.d: Killing an enemy with a status effect applied grants all group members within 15 meters, 15% critical hit chance and 15% critical hit damage for 20 seconds.

Big Game Hunter.d: When scoped, switches to semi-automatic fire mode, dealing 450% weapon damage with each shot.  Headshots grant +2% headshot damage. Stacks up to 50 times. Once at full stacks, 10 stacks decay every 4 seconds until all stacks have been removed. Headshots de

Eagle's Strike / Tenacity.d: Accuracy increases as you continuously fire, up to 30%.  Headshot kills grant the Tenacity buff for 15 seconds.  The strength of Tenacity is increased by 1% for body shots and 5% for headshots.  40% - 80% of damage taken is delayed until the buff expires.

Adaptive Instincts.d: Hitting 30 headshots grants 20% critical hit chance and 50% critical hit damage for 45 seconds.  Hitting 60 body shots grants 80% weapon damage for 45 seconds.  Hitting 30 leg shots grants 150% reload speed for 45 seconds.

Capacitance.d: Shooting enemies builds stacks to a cap of 40. Each stack grants 1.5% Skill Damage. After 5 seconds, stacks decay 1 per second.  For each utility core gain 7.5% Weapon Damage

Bluescreen.d: Shooting an enemy marks that enemy and adds a stack to the the agent up to a count of 50. Shooting a marked enemy refreshes the mark and adds stacks to the agent. When you deploy a non-shield skill, remove all stacks on agent and all marked targets trigger
